name: Generate an image via Black Forest Labs Flux
description: Solomon submits a prompt to BFL Flux Pro 1.1 and returns the rendered image to Telegram. Used for book cover variations, campaign art, and quick visual mockups.
trigger_examples: generate a book cover with weathered leather and gold foil title
make me an image of a jobsite at sunrise with tools laid out
spin up a campaign image: motivational message on a worksite background
prompt_template: Run the existing /generate command pipeline with prompt={{prompt}}. Reply via bot.sendPhoto with the image and the original prompt as caption.
escalation_conditions: prompt requests likeness of a real person other than Jed/Tasia → jed-escalate
prompt contains anything that could violate content policy

smoke_test.trigger_message: generate a moody jobsite photo, golden hour, hammers on a workbench

notes: This is wired in bot.js via /generate. Dispatch may route here for free-text 'make me an image' style requests.
